column3: "Slippery Elm reduces blood pressure" refers to its natural capability that helps lower high blood pressure levels by regulating circulation.
"Slippery Elm boosts immune system" refers to its ability to enhance the body's natural defenses and help protect against illnesses better.

"Slippery Elm reduces inflammation" refers to its ability to minimize redness and swelling in the body by either a topical application 
        or internal consumption.

"Slippery Elm promotes wound healing" refers to its ability to speed up the body's natural process of repairing damaged skin and tissues after injuries occur, through a variety of mechanisms such as reducing inflammation and promoting collagen production.
"Slippery Elm lowers cholesterol levels" refers to its ability to help decrease a person's unhealthy cholesterol numbers, which can benefit one's heart health.
"Slippery Elm improves digestion" refers to its ability to facilitate easier passage of food through the stomach.
"Slippery Elm supports liver function" refers to its natural capacity for enhancing the overall health of this essential body organ.
"Slippery Elm reduces oxidative stress" refers to its ability to minimize cell damage caused by free radicals, which are harmful molecules that can harm our bodies when in excess.
"Slippery Elm prevents cancer" refers to its ability to lower inflammation that could potentially lead to tumor growth, thus reducing chances of developing cancer.
"Slippery Elm enhances mental alertness" refers to its ability to improve brain function and focus due to the presence of natural chemicals found within it.
